prompt: Start with @m for this tiny review workflow without waiting. The first delegated handoff must be to @e to map reporter.py and README.md before any review starts. Only after that map is complete should @m hand off to @cr for review. Add a concise REVIEW.md note with the main finding or explicitly say there are no material findings, keep runtime code unchanged, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The workflow actually uses manager, explorer, and reviewer roles
Explorer runs before reviewer and maps reporter.py and README.md first
A REVIEW.md file is added with a concise review note
The final response includes review status in the required footer
must_not: Skip the @e mapping phase or send @cr before @e completes
Ask the user which subagent to use
